direction: from is the grammatical subject: from -relation-> to
authority_policy: All-families pipeline/orphan/ghost layer (non-DBP: precision-flow, GR, photonic, geometric-fault, cross-program). extensions.orphan flags proven-but-unpublished units; extensions.ghost flags natural continuations that do not exist yet. Additive source.

nodes.label: Independent audit: mean-curvature decomposition
nodes.summary: No-interaction claim CLEARED; flags a ~5.7e-7 engine bug.

nodes.label: Cross-filed Arm I / Arm M ledgers + verdicts (foreign)
nodes.summary: Arm I exact-account arithmetic + Arm M multivariate jets; only CL-M9 touches curvature. Re-homing candidate.

nodes.label: Decomposition integration report (138 surfaces + CWRU)
nodes.summary: Decomposition verified on 17+29 surfaces and CWRU bearing faults.

nodes.label: Shape-readout certificates (stages, preregs, witness battery, ledger)
nodes.summary: Stage A/F3/F4/3b.3/WALL_SCOUT preregs+reports; witness gate x2 replay; append-only claim ledger.

nodes.label: Alexandrov-Fenchel engagement (kint^2>=4 kc ks)
nodes.summary: Hypothesized inequality; attribution retired; do not implement until derived.

nodes.label: Dual Confinement
nodes.summary: Low-rank H_s/H_c confines curvature to lower floors; first testable at n=4.

nodes.label: Essential Dimension Conjecture ('if' proved; 'only if' refuted)
nodes.summary: K=0 <-> ess.dim<n; cone (D-12) falsifies 'only if' (ruled surfaces); needs restatement.

nodes.label: Essential-dimension collapse at AF saturation
nodes.summary: kc=ks, ess.dim 3->1, Delta_AF=0 coincide on one S3 surface; single-instance.

nodes.label: Gradient Focusing classification (proposed 5th fault class)
nodes.summary: |g|->0 spikes K_G at fixed numerator.

nodes.label: P-F3 split-law complex (mechanism open)
nodes.summary: Tie loci deg 704=352+352; N(D1 D2)=+square; norm-residue mechanism OPEN.

nodes.label: ARM_CLOSE_DRAFT (shape-readout arm, ratified closeout)
nodes.summary: Ratified arm close; crown = triangle decomposition; §5 lists successor gaps.

nodes.label: Two Lights computation method (proposed)
nodes.summary: Projection-based K_G avoiding the |grad F|^4 noise catastrophe; not yet validated.

nodes.label: Derivation (or retirement) of kint^2 >= 4 kc ks
nodes.summary: Explicit blocking gap: 'do not implement until a derivation is produced'; one saturation surface known.

nodes.label: Theorem: kc decomposition == n=3 member of the Triangle Decomposition
nodes.summary: Ledger already states I.3a is the n=3 triangle member and Delta_c is kc's numerator; the unifying general-n unit is unwritten.

nodes.label: Dual Confinement proof + n=4 selection-rule lemma
nodes.summary: ARM_CLOSE §5 names the unproven structural lemma; needs the n-variable engine + a rank proof. Leans WALL.

nodes.label: Restated Essential Dimension Conjecture (ruled-surface exclusion)
nodes.summary: Restatement trivial ('if' is a theorem; cone counterexample known); proving the corrected 'only if' is open math.

nodes.label: Floor-3 hierarchy certificate
nodes.summary: Hierarchy derived clean; only the missing n-variable engine blocks Floor-3 validation.

nodes.label: Standalone SHADOW_LAW_THEOREM.md
nodes.summary: Referenced by the ledger as existing but absent; mechanical extraction from ARM_CLOSE_DRAFT §3.1, parallel to F4_THEOREM.md.

nodes.label: Shape-Readout manuscript
nodes.summary: Arm CLOSED and RATIFIED with certificates banked; only write-up + mandated prior-art sweep remain.

nodes.label: R1R2<->R2R1 swap-correspondence theorem
nodes.summary: STAGE_3B3D names it 'NEXT PROOF TARGET: the law becomes a one-page theorem'; pieces banked.

nodes.label: Two Lights validation record
nodes.summary: Method justified; projections infrastructure exists in lloyd_core.py; only the test run is missing.

nodes.label: Companion Decomposition Paper v4
nodes.summary: README says 'v4 required'; every proof, audit and 138-surface+CWRU verification exists — pure assembly.

nodes.label: rank(H_c)>=2 lemma
nodes.summary: Nonzero symmetric zero-diagonal matrix has rank >= 2.

nodes.label: Geometric Fault Localization in Photonic Meshes (REV1-2)
nodes.summary: Scalar K_G=0 unique signature of a 50:50 splitter; 100% MZI fault localization. Covers ONLY Thm 8.1 + Class-1 invariance.

nodes.label: Bilinear Coupling Graph Correspondence (Thm 5, n=3)
nodes.summary: K_G=0 iff the coupling graph is open (bilinear, n=3).

nodes.label: CL-F1 quadratic shape-moment basis
nodes.summary: {m2_triv,m2_std,m2_shape} basis of S_n-invariant quadratics, n>=5.

nodes.label: CL-F2 generic separation (120/120)
nodes.summary: m2_shape separates all nonzero-delta conjugation pairs, n=5,6,7.

nodes.label: CL-F3 fiber completeness (local proved; global open)
nodes.summary: deg<=3 invariants locally complete on sigma-fibers at 3 strata.

nodes.label: CL-F4 n-uniformity (F4 theorem)
nodes.summary: a_d(n) = d-edge multigraph classes, stabilizing at n=2d.

nodes.label: Curvature Decomposition Thms 1-3 (algebraic+geometric+uniqueness)
nodes.summary: K_G=kc+ks+kint exact; algebraic and geometric routes identical. PROVEN, in no paper.

nodes.label: CL-ENG2 fault-localization numerator law
nodes.summary: Fault invariant is the Delta_c numerator; triangle localizes the faulted edge.

nodes.label: Gradient Irreducibility (Thm 4)
nodes.summary: Gradient dependence of kc cannot be eliminated on implicit surfaces.

nodes.label: Interaction curvature vanishes on explicit surfaces (D-6)
nodes.summary: kint=0 identically on any explicit/Monge surface.

nodes.label: Mean Curvature Decomposition (Floor 1)
nodes.summary: H=H_c+H_s with no interaction term; independently audited.

nodes.label: Monge Prohibition
nodes.summary: On Monge patches kc<=0, so kc,ks not both >0; AF attribution dropped.

nodes.label: REALFIBER theorem
nodes.summary: Rank-2 zero-diagonal isospectral fiber path-connected for m>=3; grounding sign-off pending.

nodes.label: K_G invariance under role transposition (Thm 8.1, applied)
nodes.summary: K_G invariant under all 6 (D,S,P) role permutations; basis of the paper.

nodes.label: Symmetric Polynomial Hierarchy (Floors 1-2 proved)
nodes.summary: e_k splits into k+1 coupling-self orders; Floors>=3 await an n-variable engine.

nodes.label: Decomposition Symmetry Profile (D-13/D-14)
nodes.summary: Components translation/scale invariant, rotation-redistributed; ratios scale-invariant.

nodes.label: Triangle Decomposition / Shadow Law (general n, arm crown)
nodes.summary: Delta_c = q Sum h^2 - |Mg|^2; n=3 member = I.3a coupling form. Proven+certified; lives only inside the arm-close draft.

nodes.label: GR verification calculation
nodes.summary: Rectangular-loop holonomy / Riemann-symmetry check.

nodes.label: Formal paper: Universal Singularity Structure of Lifted Compatibility Objects
nodes.summary: GR_PAPER_BRIEF is a complete writing scaffold (theorem, proof sketch, 327-pt table, section map); only the manuscript is absent.

nodes.label: Gr_Applications (kc/ks=12/5, ISCO cancellation, Lambda passenger, zeta exponent)
nodes.summary: Four exploratory results computed, NOT verified (Tier 3); no derivation trail. Orphan reserve.

nodes.label: Whitepaper: GR critical-exponent recovery (Refinery)
nodes.summary: V4 Refinery recovers Schwarzschild ISCO 1/2, Kerr 1/3, retrograde 45/16 from finite-precision sweeps. Draft v1.

nodes.label: Kerr retrograde coefficient -45/16 (analytic)
nodes.summary: delta^{1/3},delta^{2/3} corrections cancel; leading term -(45/16)delta; bit-identical to measurement.

nodes.label: Universal singularity structure of lifted compatibility objects
nodes.summary: k>=2 compatibility, lift F=Sum Fi^2-X^2; Hessian [2J^TJ,0;0,-2], H_XX=-2 universal; 327 pts/4 domains, zero exceptions. Proof sketch + scaffold, NO formal paper.

nodes.summary: Exact law t_{q+1}=2t_q-D (angle-doubling); residual = unread binary tail.

nodes.summary: Half-integer vs integer lattice grain derived (previously only empirical).

nodes.summary: t invariant under x2^j rescale; breaking localized to breaker's descendant-closure. Orphan.

nodes.summary: Exact classification of DAG-node deviation under precision bump; full state reconstructable. Orphan.

nodes.label: Refinement Law + corollaries (dyadic death, ord2 periodicity)
nodes.summary: Rational period = ord2(b0); irrational distinctness. Stages A-D graded. NO released paper carries it.

nodes.label: Robust branch transfer law (alpha-1 slope)
nodes.summary: Controlled branch form => limiting log-log transfer slope = alpha-1.

nodes.summary: Named Lemma 1 + Thms 1-4 + KN table; FULLY REALIZED by LOCAL_CURVATURE_CALCULUS_COMPLETE + lead7 KN paper. Filing debt only.

nodes.label: Conjecture C subnormal cbrt closeout (qualified)
nodes.summary: Subnormal cbrt residual on 2^-1074 lattice, j in {-4..+1} (~98.7%), implementation-dependent; no cbrt regression test.

nodes.label: Conjecture C proof closeout (normal range)
nodes.summary: Case analysis + 1022-case finite enumeration + monotonicity; makes the c2 lattice theorem unconditional.

nodes.label: E-atom / bilinear pinning native Legendre derivation
nodes.summary: Legendre relation as unique constant bilinear invariant B=EK~+E~K-KK~=W0. Home periods paper absent in-family.
